_comment: Copy this file to ~/.stask-qa/credentials.json, fill in real values, chmod 600. Never commit.

github._comment: The dummy repo you created. Must be writable by `gh auth`.

slack._comment_human: Your Slack user ID (Profile → ⋮ → Copy member ID). Used as the project owner in the sandbox.
slack._comment_apps: Four separate Slack apps (bot + socket). Create distinct apps from your production ones so channels don't cross-contaminate. Each needs channels:manage, chat:write, canvases:*, lists:*, bookmarks:write, users:read.
